title: Shortest Alternating Color Path
hints: Treat the color of the last edge used as part of the state. This turns the problem into a standard shortest path search on a modified graph.
Use BFS starting from node 0. Track visited states as (node, last_color) to avoid cycles and ensure shortest paths.
Initialize distances for (0, RED) and (0, BLUE) to 0. When traversing, only follow edges with a color different from the current state's color.
